name: playwright-nexudus-sh
description: Playwright test automation framework for Nexudus

scripts.test:bdd:gen: node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx bddgen test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts
scripts.test:bdd: npm run test:bdd:gen && node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts
scripts.test:bdd:headed: npm run test:bdd:gen && node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --headed
scripts.test:bdd:meeting-room-seed: npm run test:bdd:gen && node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts tests/bdd/.features-gen/ap/meeting-room-seed-utility.feature.spec.js --project "MP BDD Chromium" --workers=1
scripts.test:bdd:report: node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright show-report playwright-report/bdd
scripts.test:gremlins: node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright test -c playwright.gremlins.config.ts
scripts.test:gremlins:headed: node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright test -c playwright.gremlins.config.ts --headed
scripts.test:gremlins:mp: node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright test -c playwright.gremlins.config.ts --project "MP Gremlins Chromium"
scripts.test:gremlins:report: node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright show-report playwright-report/gremlins
scripts.test:lighthouse: node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright test -c playwright.lighthouse.config.ts
scripts.test:lighthouse:ap: node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright test -c playwright.lighthouse.config.ts --project "AP Lighthouse"
scripts.test:lighthouse:mp: node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright test -c playwright.lighthouse.config.ts --project "MP Lighthouse"
scripts.test:lighthouse:playwright-report: node scripts/run-with-dotenv.mjs -- npx playwright show-report playwright-report/lighthouse

author: Steven Hobbs
